zh.lifeSummary: 當John Flegg於大約1534年出生在英國諾福爾可希達哈姆時，他的父親Richard Flegg36歲，母親Margaret31歲。他於1564年6月1日與Christian Cornell在英國諾福爾可希達哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Flegg于大约1534年出生在英国諾福爾可希達哈姆时，他的父亲Richard Flegg36岁，母亲Margaret31岁。他于1564年6月1日与Christian Cornell在英国諾福爾可希達哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Flegg was born about 1534, in Shipdham, Norfolk, England, his father, Richard Flegg, was 36 and his mother, Margaret, was 31. He married Christian Cornell on 1 June 1564, in Shipdham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Flegg est né environ 1534, à Shipdham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Richard Flegg, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Christian Cornell le 1 juin 1564, à Shipdham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Flegg um 1534 in Shipdham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Flegg 36 und seine Mutter Margaret 31. Er hat am 1. Juni 1564 in Shipdham, Norfolk, England Christian Cornell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Flegg è nato il circa 1534 nel Shipdham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Richard Flegg, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Christian Cornell il 1 giugno 1564, nel Shipdham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fleggが約1534年にイギリスノーフォルクシュイプドハムで生まれた時，父Richard Fleggは36歳，母Margaretは31歳であった。1564年6月1日にイギリスノーフォルクシュイプドハムでChristian Cornellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John Flegg(이)가 대략 1534년 영국 노르폴크 시p드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Flegg(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1564년 6월 1일 영국 노르폴크 시p드함에서 Christian Cornell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Flegg nasceu aproximadamente 1534, em Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Flegg, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Christian Cornell em 1 de junho de 1564, em Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Flegg родился около 1534 г. в местности шипдхам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Flegg было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian Cornell 1 июня 1564 г. в местности шипдхам, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Flegg nació aproximadamente 1534, en Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Flegg, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Christian Cornell el 1 de junio de 1564, en Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
